title: vaccinium puberulum
intro: Vaccinium puberulum, also known as the hairy bilberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vaccinium puberulum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function, among others. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by making teas, tinctures, or infusions from its leaves and berries.
